title: Integration tests skip when datasets are absent
evidence: loader_test.go:31 t.Skipf in realStore() guards TestLoadAllDatasets/TestStandings2019Real/TestFlaFluReal/TestBrazilianPlayersReal; datasets are present under data/kaggle/ so the skip does not trigger in this run
suggestion: Reasonable guard, but be aware these four data-dependent tests silently vanish if data/kaggle/ is missing

title: Hand-rolled MCP protocol with zero external dependencies
evidence: mcp.go implements JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdio (initialize/ping/tools.list/tools.call) from stdlib only; go.mod has no require block
suggestion: No action — notable that the server avoids an MCP SDK entirely

title: Cross-dataset de-duplication and single-source standings beyond spec
evidence: model.go:69 Match.signature() collapses the same game across overlapping datasets; store.go:305 standingsSourcePriority computes standings from one source to avoid double-counting
suggestion: No action — correctness safeguard not explicitly required
